description: tRPC server-side prototype pollution via formDataToObject (CVE-2025-68130, GHSA-43p4-m455-4f4j). Affects @trpc/server experimental_nextAppDirCaller path on Next.js App Router. Attacker submits form fields named __proto__.X or constructor.prototype.X to pollute Object.prototype across the entire process.

trpc_form_data_proto.description: POST tRPC form input with __proto__ key — formDataToObject helper writes to Object.prototype if not patched.

probes.description: Inject __proto__.polluted via form body. Response 200 + subsequent request reflects polluted=true on unrelated object indicates SSPP.
Alternative gadget — constructor.prototype path bypasses naive __proto__ filters

trpc_batch_input_proto.description: tRPC HTTP batch link — POST /api/trpc/<route>?batch=1 with JSON body. Some setups pass inputs through unsafe merge.

probes.description: JSON-body batch with prototype-polluting input. Look for behavior change on subsequent unauth request.

next_app_dir_caller_sniff.description: Passive: detect experimental_nextAppDirCaller usage via response headers / cookie path / x-trpc-source.
